title: Extra Select Tropical Flake Complete Fish Food, 50 g
availability_text: Only 15 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Suitable for all types of Tropical fish
description: From the manufacturer Our Goldfish and Tropical Flakes Provide an array of quality animal products at good value Cat / Dog Food & Treats Small Animal Food, Treats & Bedding Wild Bird Food, Treats & Feeders Poultry Food & Supplements Fish / Turtle & Terrapin Food Our Indoor Extra Select Fish Food Range The Extra Select range of indoor fish food has been developed to support the full nutritional needs for a whole variety of tanked fish. So whether you're looking for goldfish flakes, or something a little more tropical, we have something to suit your budget. Balanced Formulation Complete Food Ideal for a healthy diet Extra Select Tropical Flakes The Extra Select Tropical is a complete food which has a highly digestible and balanced formulation which gives your fish the healthy diet they require. The fish food blend is composed with a variety of vitamins and minerals and come in a variety of different sizes to be suitable for a variety of Tropical. Extra Select Tropical flakes are available in 50g tubs. Feeding Guide It’s important to only feed as much food that can be eaten within a couple of minutes, do not overfeed. We recommend feeding your fish up to 2 times daily.
